scripts.capture:demo: pnpm --filter @skelcore/skelcore build && node packages/skelcore/dist/build.js capture --config apps/demo/skelcore.capture.config.mjs
scripts.quality:validate: pnpm --filter @skelcore/cli build && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const cp=require('node:child_process'); const manifestPath='apps/demo/lib/skelcore/generated/manifest.json'; const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(manifestPath,'utf8')); const requiredKeys=Object.keys(manifest.entries ?? {}).sort(); const result=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,['packages/cli/dist/index.js','validate','--manifest',manifestPath,'--required-keys',requiredKeys.join(','),'--min-coverage','1','--max-invalid','0','--max-size-kb','512','--json-out','.tmp/skelcore/validate.json','--text-out','.tmp/skelcore/validate.txt'],{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.quality:diff: pnpm --filter @skelcore/cli build && node -e "const cp=require('node:child_process'); const baseManifest=process.env.QUALITY_BASE_MANIFEST ?? 'apps/demo/lib/skelcore/generated/manifest.json'; const candidateManifest=process.env.QUALITY_CANDIDATE_MANIFEST ?? 'apps/demo/lib/skelcore/generated/manifest.json'; const result=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,['packages/cli/dist/index.js','diff','--base',baseManifest,'--candidate',candidateManifest,'--max-changed','0','--json-out','.tmp/skelcore/diff.json','--text-out','.tmp/skelcore/diff.txt'],{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.quality:report: pnpm --filter @skelcore/cli build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js report --validate-json .tmp/skelcore/validate.json --diff-json .tmp/skelcore/diff.json --format json --out .tmp/skelcore/report.json
scripts.quality:gate: pnpm quality:validate && pnpm quality:diff && pnpm quality:report
scripts.stabilize:ready: pnpm --filter @skelcore/react test -- src/__tests__/resolver.test.ts src/__tests__/manifest-resolver.test.ts && pnpm --filter @skelcore/cli test -- src/__tests__/route-crawler.test.ts src/__tests__/manifest-writer.test.ts src/__tests__/capture-command.test.ts src/__tests__/report-command.test.ts && pnpm --filter @skelcore/core test -- src/__tests__/manifest-validator.test.ts && pnpm --filter demo typecheck && pnpm resolver:perf && pnpm quality:slo
scripts.facade-contract:ready: pnpm turbo run build --filter=@skelcore/skelcore && pnpm turbo run test --filter=@skelcore/skelcore && pnpm turbo run typecheck --filter=@skelcore/skelcore
scripts.single-package:ready: pnpm --filter @skelcore/skelcore build && pnpm --filter @skelcore/skelcore test && pnpm --filter demo build
scripts.validate: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test
